purpose: Public-safe shared multi-authority official source inventory records used by timetable acquisition planning and Calendar Readiness references.

records.notes: Official public calendar source candidate for JRA meeting-date confirmation. This record does not claim that a live adapter or fetch implementation exists.

records.authority_name_en: National Association of Racing / local government racing
records.authority_name_local: 地方競馬全国協会 / 地方競馬
records.notes: Official public local-government racing monthly convening source candidate for meeting-date confirmation. This record does not claim that a live adapter or fetch implementation exists.
Reviewed HKJC fixture and programme routes cover Sha Tin and Happy Valley at A+ technical capability. Public output remains capped at A and no live implementation is claimed.
Official ERA season schedule confirms meeting dates and venue scope. This backfill does not claim reusable race-time acquisition or an active adapter.
Reviewed KRA routes exposed complete Race 1-N post times and distance coverage for Seoul, Busan-Gyeongnam, and Jeju. No active scheduled implementation is claimed.
Reviewed TJK annual and daily programme routes covered ten racecourses with complete Race 1-N post times. Public output remains capped at A.
Official SOREC information is reachable, but a stable public meeting source and timetable route were not confirmed. Capability rank C is the schema floor and is not an active publication claim.

records.authority_name_en: Teletrak and reviewed Chile venue programme network
records.notes: Reviewed Teletrak discovery and four venue programme routes expose A+ technical data for the tested venues. Simulcasting is excluded and nationwide completeness is not claimed.
Reviewed Monterrico official programme and API routes exposed complete post times and programme summary fields for three meetings. National completeness is not claimed.
The reviewed official-site candidate was unreachable and no programme, PDF, API, or timetable source was confirmed. Capability rank C is the schema floor and is not an active publication claim.
Reviewed Gávea programme evidence supports A+ technical capability for the tested Thoroughbred meeting. This is one venue-specific system.
Reviewed Cidade Jardim evidence includes timed Thoroughbred racing and a separate untimed Arabian supplementary race. The racing-code distinction must be retained.

records.authority_name_en: Jockey Club do Rio Grande do Sul
records.notes: Reviewed Cristal programme evidence confirmed race labels and post times at A technical capability.
Reviewed Sorocaba programme evidence contains race times, but the exact meeting-date pairing remains unresolved. It must not enter current Calendar data until that condition is closed.
Reviewed official racecard routes exposed complete race labels, post times, and distances. Reliable venue identity remains unresolved and prohibited racecard fields must be ignored.
Reviewed 2025-26 QREC data exposed complete race identity, post times, names, and distances. The source requires revalidation at the 2026-27 season opening and venue labels remain unresolved.
Official reports and club-channel evidence confirm activity at Al Rahba, but no stable advance fixture or scheduled post-time source was confirmed.
Reviewed official card evidence confirms meeting date and Borrowdale Park, but no reliable scheduled post times.
Reviewed JRA programme evidence confirms A+ technical timetable capability. Public output remains capped at A and this does not claim an active production adapter.
Official Banei route is reviewed as a separate system. Complete timetable capability remains pending and JRA capability must not be generalized to it.
Reviewed Thoroughbred samples exposed meeting and per-race post-time fields at A+ technical capability. Harness coverage is separate.
Official HRNZ calendar confirms harness race dates. Complete per-race timetable capability was not established in the reviewed batch.
Reviewed 4Racing operator pages exposed meeting and per-race timetable fields. This record is operator-specific and not a national feed claim.
Reviewed Gold Circle operator pages exposed meeting and per-race timetable fields. This record remains separate from 4Racing.
Reviewed official HRU route confirms meeting dates and venues for Maroñas and Las Piedras. Stable per-race post times were not confirmed.
Reviewed official calendar confirms race days and venues. Reusable first-race or per-race times were not confirmed.
Reviewed national guidance confirms race days and venue context, but nationwide completeness and reusable race times remain unconfirmed.
Reviewed official Klampenborg route confirms venue-level meeting dates. General event times must not be converted into race post times.
Reviewed national route confirms dated meetings and venue context. A stable national per-race timetable was not confirmed.
Reviewed official Chuchle route confirms venue-level dated meetings. No stable per-race timetable is claimed.
Reviewed official Most route confirms venue-level dated meetings. No stable per-race timetable is claimed.
Reviewed Kincsem Park calendar and official programme files expose race labels and post times for the tested Thoroughbred and harness scope.
Reviewed Malta Racing Club calendar confirms meeting dates and the Malta Equidrome context; reusable race times were not confirmed.
Reviewed Krieau race dates and race newspapers expose race labels and post times; Austrian national coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed official Camarero programme routes support race labels and post times.

records.authority_name_en: Caymanas Park / Supreme Ventures Racing and Entertainment
records.notes: Reviewed Caymanas calendar and race-card routes expose reusable race schedule fields.
Reviewed Arima Race Club fixture and official programme documents support Santa Rosa Park race schedules.
Reviewed calendar and official programme routes support Garrison Savannah race schedules.
Reviewed Carrère and LETROT routes confirm current meeting identity, but stable forward timetable extraction is not confirmed.
Reviewed national BHA fixture list confirms meeting dates and racecourses for British flat and jump racing.
Reviewed Equibase Thoroughbred routes expose meeting and per-race schedule information; other codes and state structures remain outside scope.
Reviewed Racing Australia Thoroughbred programme routes expose race-level schedules; wider state and code coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed HRI national fixture and meeting routes support flat and National Hunt race schedules.
Reviewed France Galop programme route supports flat and obstacle meeting and race schedules.
Reviewed LETROT programme route supports harness meeting and race schedules.
Reviewed Ontario race-date evidence covers provincial Thoroughbred, Standardbred, and Quarter Horse contexts without proving national coverage.
Reviewed Standardbred Canada routes support detailed harness schedules; Canadian multi-code provincial coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed centralized JCSA season, meeting, and race routes support Thoroughbred and Purebred Arabian schedules.
Reviewed Bangalore Turf Club fixture routes support detailed schedules within one club system.
Reviewed RWITC calendar routes support detailed schedules within the club system.
Reviewed official club route confirms the RCTC system, but a stable machine-usable timetable route is not recorded in the Profile source registry.
Reviewed official club route confirms the Madras system, but a stable machine-usable timetable route is not recorded in the Profile source registry.
Reviewed MRA fixture route confirms Malaysian meeting dates and racecourse context. It does not establish reusable race times or an active adapter.
Reviewed RBSC event route confirms the Bangkok racing context. Country-wide completeness and reusable race times are not claimed.
Reviewed PHILRACOM calendar confirms national meeting dates. Stable reusable race-time fields are not established.
Reviewed MTC Jockey Club calendar confirms 2026 Champ de Mars meeting dates. Race times are not established.
Reviewed Palermo schedules support race-level timing for one subsystem. Wider Argentine racecourse coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed Deutscher Galopp schedules support race-level timing for the gallop system. Other horse-racing codes remain outside this decision.

records.authority_name_en: Ministry of Agriculture, Food Sovereignty and Forestry
records.notes: Reviewed MASAF calendar confirms national trot and gallop meeting dates and racecourses. Reusable race times are not established.
Reviewed Zarzuela programme supports detailed gallop schedules for one venue subsystem. Wider Spanish code and venue coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed DNT calendar confirms 2026 Norwegian harness meeting dates and racecourses. Detailed subsystem data is not generalized into a national race-time feed.
Reviewed Øvrevoll fixture route confirms gallop meeting dates. Reusable race times are not established.
Reviewed Suomen Hippos route confirms the 2026 national harness calendar. Stable reusable race-time fields are not established.
Reviewed NDR calendar confirms Dutch draf and rensport meeting dates and racecourses. A reusable national race-time route is not established.
Reviewed Suisse Trot calendar confirms trot meeting dates and racecourses. Trot remains separate from gallop.
Reviewed Galop Suisse route confirms gallop meeting dates and racecourses. Gallop remains separate from trot.
Reviewed PKWK 2026 national plan confirms dates and track context for Warszawa, Wrocław, and Sopot. Reusable race times are not established.
Reviewed Ploiești notices expose meeting dates and first-race times for one venue subsystem. Wider Romanian coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed Belgrade schedules expose race-level times for one venue subsystem. Wider Serbian coverage remains incomplete.
Reviewed official calendar and meeting pages expose dates, venues, and first/last race-time capability. Public output remains capped at C.
The official meetings page links monthly schedules. Only meeting dates and venue context are approved for Calendar planning; higher-detail routes remain excluded.
Official date-addressable programme events for Hipódromo Presidente Remón; public planning is restricted to meeting date and racecourse.
The official support site and linked app advertise an event calendar; the timetable is not exposed as a stable public web feed.
Official JCK page lists current and next-season race dates at Ngong Racecourse; only meeting-level date and venue data are approved.
The official Lahore events route is identifiable but not current for 2026; other Pakistan club systems are outside this record.
The official JavaScript-rendered site exposes a calendar and programme entry point; the next-event area may be empty between publications.
The official INH platform confirms active 2026 meeting contexts, but no stable public upcoming meeting calendar was found on the reviewed routes.
The federation calendar aggregates Belgian racecourses and exposes meeting dates, venues, race labels, and post times; public country display remains C.
Official federation route is verified, but a stable current-season meeting calendar was not confirmed.
Official 2026 Zagreb calendar confirms meeting dates and venue; one August date remains provisional.
Official date-addressable calendar routes support meeting-date and venue confirmation for the reviewed racecourse.
Official calendar route exists but may be intermittently slow or unavailable; manual confirmation is required.
Official international member page identifies the authority context, but no current 2026 calendar is published.
Official racing route is identifiable, but no current 2026 upcoming calendar was confirmed.
Official source confirms an October 2026 launch at Conghua, but no stable upcoming meeting-date calendar is published.
Official 2026 race-event calendar supports meeting-date and venue confirmation through manual review.
